page.text:
Ostend Coastguard, Ostend Coastguard, Ostend Coastguard. This is MV Marina, MV Marina, MV Marina. How do you read me? Over.
MV Marina, MV Marina, MV Marina. This is Ostend Coastguard Ostend Coastguard, Ostend Coastguard. I read you excellent. Go ahead with your message. Over.
Ostend Coastguard. This is MV Marina. Located a vessel dumping waste in position 51 degrees 45 minutes North/003 degrees 12 minutes East at 1020 UTC. Repeat 51 degrees 45 minutes North/003 degrees 12 minutes East at 1020 UTC. Over.
Ostend Coastguard. This is MV Marina. Yes, I can identify the polluter. Polluter is MV Suzie. Over.
MV Marina. This is Ostend Coastguard. What is course and speed of the polluter? Over.

Ostend Coastguard. This is MV Marina. Course of the polluter is 012 degrees, speed 10 knots. Over.
MV Marina. This is Ostend Coastguard. ADVICE. Stay in vicinity of the polluter. I will send coastguard assistance. Over.
Ostend Coastguard. This is MV Marina. Message understood. I will stay in vicinity of the polluter. Out.
